_note: Single source of truth for the marketing one-pagers AND the in-app Help capabilities list. Add a feature here (one entry) and run `npm run gen:onepagers` to refresh the PDFs; the Help page reads this file directly and updates on its own. CI fails if this file changes without the sheets being regenerated.
tagline: Live scoring, real handicaps, and every game your group loves — in one free app you add to your phone.

cards.title: Every format you play
cards.body: Stableford, stroke play, singles & four-ball match play, skins and the Ryder-style trifecta — all scored automatically, hole by hole.

cards.title: Live, shared scoring
cards.body: One keeper enters the group and standings update in real time. Share a live link and anyone can follow the round from the clubhouse.

cards.title: Handicaps that keep themselves
cards.body: A running WHS-style index — best 8 of your last 20 — with automatic course handicap and net scoring. Or simply enter your own.

cards.title: Know your game
cards.body: A personal dashboard: index and scoring trends, par-3/4/5 averages, fairways, greens, putts, scrambling and sand saves.

cards.title: Every course, one library
cards.body: Search and save any course into one shared library with per-tee yardages and stroke indexes. Spot a wrong number? Suggest a fix — an admin approves it for everyone.

cards.title: Split costs, settle up
cards.body: Track who paid and who owes, split evenly or custom, see every balance at a glance, and send a friendly nudge — no math at the bar.

cards.title: Settle up, automatically
cards.body: The Stableford money game, the sixes and side-bets settle themselves and post straight to the Money tab — the bar tab sorts itself out.

cards.title: Your club, organised
cards.body: Invite by code or link, manage players and handicaps, and lean on an admin toolkit with a full score audit trail and oversight.

cards.title: Built for the course
cards.body: Installs like an app, works offline, never drops a score on a dead signal — and phone alerts keep the group in the loop.

tgcExclusives.title: Tee Times
tgcExclusives.body: Schedule, collect RSVPs, name a captain, send reminders, export to WhatsApp.

tgcExclusives.title: The money game
tgcExclusives.body: Automatic Stableford bet settlement; winners and losers split, posted to Money.

tgcExclusives.title: Clean Sweep & the sixes
tgcExclusives.body: Front / Middle / Last six net-Stableford subtotals with live sweep tracking.

tgcExclusives.title: Member tees by default
tgcExclusives.body: New games default to the member tee, so the field is set up right.
